fn_declaraion.fn_code:
byte_regex_compile (const char *pattern, size_t size,
                                         reg_syntax_t syntax,
                                         struct re_pattern_buffer *bufp)

wcs_regex_compile (const char *pattern, size_t size,
                                        reg_syntax_t syntax,
                                        struct re_pattern_buffer *bufp)

wcs_re_match_2_internal (struct re_pattern_buffer *bufp,
                                    const char *cstring1, int csize1,
                                    const char *cstring2, int csize2,
                                    int pos,
                                    struct re_registers *regs,
                                    int stop,
                                    wchar_t *string1, int size1,
                                    wchar_t *string2, int size2,
                                    int *mbs_offset1, int *mbs_offset2)

convert_mbs_to_wcs (CHAR_T *dest, const unsigned char* src,
				  size_t len, int *offset_buffer,
				  char *is_binary)

PREFIX(store_op2) (re_opcode_t op, UCHAR_T *loc,
                               int arg1, int arg2)

PREFIX(insert_op1) (re_opcode_t op, UCHAR_T *loc,
                                int arg, UCHAR_T *end)

PREFIX(insert_op2) (re_opcode_t op, UCHAR_T *loc,
                                int arg1, int arg2, UCHAR_T *end)

PREFIX(at_begline_loc_p) (const CHAR_T *pattern,
                                         const CHAR_T *p,
                                         reg_syntax_t syntax)

PREFIX(at_endline_loc_p) (const CHAR_T *p,
                                         const CHAR_T *pend,
                                         reg_syntax_t syntax)

wcs_compile_range (CHAR_T range_start,
                                        const CHAR_T **p_ptr,
                                        const CHAR_T *pend,
                                        char *translate,
                                        reg_syntax_t syntax,
                                        UCHAR_T *b,
                                        CHAR_T *char_set)

byte_compile_range (unsigned int range_start,
                                         const char **p_ptr,
                                         const char *pend,
                                         char *translate,
                                         reg_syntax_t syntax,
                                         unsigned char *b)

PREFIX(bcmp_translate) (const CHAR_T *s1, const CHAR_T *s2,
                                   int len, char *translate)

re_compile_pattern (const char *pattern, size_t length,
                    struct re_pattern_buffer *bufp)
